repair_summary: Replaced manual string formatting with pandas DataFrame to_string() to match exact expected output formatting
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include an input file with at least four lines covering leading spaces, trailing spaces, multiple spaces, tabs, and chromosome name case variations.
Scaled executable cases must include an input line with start > end to test skipping.
Scaled executable cases must include an input file with lines in non-sorted order to test sorting.
